name: Nominatim GIS
description: Self-hosted geocoding and GIS — forward/reverse geocode, batch geocode data columns, generate GeoJSON, map visualizations
author: Crow

env_vars.name: NOMINATIM_PBF_URL
env_vars.description: PBF data file URL for import (default: US extract from Geofabrik)

notes: Requires significant disk space (US extract: ~30GB, full planet: ~1TB) and 4GB+ RAM. Initial import takes several hours. Depends on the Data Dashboard bundle for full integration.
